race.comment: KRASINA (2) has been kept fresh since running on powerfully to be beaten half a length in Saturday company over 1100m at Randwick on 6 June. That form stands out in a race of this quality. Likely to improve off this run but still has the class to take care of these. ADELEKE (6) was well in commission on debut last time out over 1250m at the Kensington track and did a fair job to be beaten under two lengths after travelling in the leading division. Major player with some natural improvement to come. FARFETCHED (1) had her chance but didn't finish off as hoped over 1100m at this track a fortnight ago. Lightly raced filly who is better than that and deserves another chance. QUEEN'S GAMBLE (5) last appeared when third on debut over 900m at Newcastle on 31 January. Tougher assignment today but should not be underestimated. First starter GOLDEN GODDESS (3) is trialling okay and looks ready to make her mark immediately.
